mapper.insert: insert into chat_messages(sender_id, receiver_id, content, msg_type, is_read, create_time) values(#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{msgType}, 0, now())
mapper.select: select * from chat_messages where (sender_id = #{userId1} and receiver_id = #{userId2}) or (sender_id = #{userId2} and receiver_id = #{userId1}) order by create_time asc
mapper.update: update chat_messages set is_read = 1 where sender_id = #{senderId} and receiver_id = #{receiverId} and is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id as userId, u.phone as username, u.nickname as nickname, u.avatar as avatar, t.content as lastMsg, t.create_time as lastTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages WHERE sender_id = u.user_id AND receiver_id = #{merchantId} AND is_read = 0) as unreadCount FROM ( /* 找出每个跟商家聊过天的用户，并拿到最后一次聊天的消息ID */ SELECT IF(sender_id = #{merchantId}, receiver_id, sender_id) as other_id, MAX(message_id) as max_id FROM chat_messages WHERE sender_id = #{merchantId} OR receiver_id = #{merchantId} GROUP BY other_id ) latest JOIN users u ON u.user_id = latest.other_id JOIN chat_messages t ON t.message_id = latest.max_id ORDER BY lastTime DESC
